secret_key.title: Secret Key
secret_key.x-help: Secret key name to resolve from secrets.json. Use '!secret key_name' in config. Never store actual secrets in options.json!

SecretStr.title: SecretStr
SecretStr.x-help: SecretStr provides secure secret management. Secrets stored in separate secrets.json file, never in main config. Reference format: "!secret key_name". Essential for passwords, API tokens, and sensitive data.

source_day_ahead.title: Source Day Ahead
source_day_ahead.x-help: Data source for day-ahead electricity market prices. 'nordpool' for Nordic/Baltic, 'entsoe' for European markets, 'tibber' if using Tibber integration.

entsoe_api_key.title: Entsoe Api Key
entsoe_api_key.x-help: API key for ENTSO-E Transparency Platform. Required if source_day_ahead='entsoe'. Get free key at transparency.entsoe.eu. Use !secret for security.

energy_taxes_consumption.description: Energy taxes for consumption by date (YYYY-MM-DD -> euro/kWh ex VAT)
energy_taxes_consumption.title: Energy Taxes Consumption
energy_taxes_consumption.x-help: Energy taxes on consumption (excluding VAT) indexed by effective date. Format: {'2024-01-01': 0.05}. Use date when tariff changes.
energy_taxes_consumption.x-validation-hint: Dict with YYYY-MM-DD keys, float values (ex VAT)

energy_taxes_production.description: Energy taxes for production by date (YYYY-MM-DD -> euro/kWh ex VAT)
energy_taxes_production.title: Energy Taxes Production
energy_taxes_production.x-help: Energy taxes on feed-in/production (excluding VAT) indexed by effective date. Often zero or negative. Format: {'2024-01-01': 0.0}.
energy_taxes_production.x-validation-hint: Dict with YYYY-MM-DD keys, float values (ex VAT)

cost_supplier_consumption.description: Supplier costs for consumption by date (YYYY-MM-DD -> euro/kWh ex VAT)
cost_supplier_consumption.title: Cost Supplier Consumption
cost_supplier_consumption.x-help: Supplier markup/fees for consumption (excluding VAT) indexed by effective date. Fixed part of electricity cost. Format: {'2024-01-01': 0.02}.
cost_supplier_consumption.x-validation-hint: Dict with YYYY-MM-DD keys, float values (ex VAT)

cost_supplier_production.description: Supplier costs for production by date (YYYY-MM-DD -> euro/kWh ex VAT)
cost_supplier_production.title: Cost Supplier Production
cost_supplier_production.x-help: Supplier fees for feed-in/production (excluding VAT) indexed by effective date. May be negative (credit). Format: {'2024-01-01': -0.02}.
cost_supplier_production.x-validation-hint: Dict with YYYY-MM-DD keys, float values (ex VAT)

vat_consumption.description: VAT percentage for consumption by date (YYYY-MM-DD -> %)
vat_consumption.title: Vat Consumption
vat_consumption.x-help: VAT percentage on consumption indexed by effective date. Format: {'2024-01-01': 21}. Applied to market price + taxes + supplier costs.
vat_consumption.x-validation-hint: Dict with YYYY-MM-DD keys, integer 0-100 values

vat_production.description: VAT percentage for production by date (YYYY-MM-DD -> %)
vat_production.title: Vat Production
vat_production.x-help: VAT percentage on feed-in/production indexed by effective date. Format: {'2024-01-01': 21}. Often same as consumption VAT.
vat_production.x-validation-hint: Dict with YYYY-MM-DD keys, integer 0-100 values

last_invoice.title: Last Invoice
last_invoice.x-help: Date of last electricity invoice. Used for calculating costs since last billing period. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Update after receiving invoices.

tax_refund.title: Tax Refund
tax_refund.x-help: Enable tax refund calculation if eligible. Some regions/users get energy tax refunds for solar production. Can be boolean or HA entity ID.

title: PricingConfig
x-help:
# Pricing & Tariff Configuration

Configure electricity market prices and tariff components for accurate cost optimization.

## Price Components

Total electricity cost consists of:
1. **Market price**: Day-ahead spot price (nordpool/entsoe/tibber)
2. **Energy taxes**: Government energy taxes
3. **Supplier costs**: Your supplier's markup/fees
4. **VAT**: Value-added tax on sum of above

Consumption price = (market + taxes + supplier) × (1 + VAT)

## Date-Based Tariffs

All tariff fields use date-indexed dictionaries:
```json
{
  "2024-01-01": 0.05,
  "2024-07-01": 0.06
}
```

System uses tariff active on optimization date.

## Data Sources

- **nordpool**: Nord Pool (Nordic/Baltic markets)
- **entsoe**: ENTSO-E Transparency Platform (all European markets)
- **tibber**: Tibber API (if using Tibber as supplier)

## Tips

- All prices are EXCLUDING VAT (VAT applied separately)
- Update tariffs when your supplier changes prices
- Use !secret for API keys
- Production costs often lower than consumption (or negative for feed-in credit)
- Keep last_invoice updated for accurate cost tracking
- Check your electricity bill for exact tariff components
